proposal_quality_delta.why: no tracked pre-repair stage metrics were persisted for this case

repair_delta.why_partial: tracked reports expose displacement but not stage-B/C/D HPWL or bbox deltas

evidence: trained final quality is worse on both HPWL and bbox even though repair displacement is not higher
tracked finalizer code is legality-oriented and does not optimize HPWL/bbox, so it is likely preserving poor proposal geometry rather than correcting it

action_histograms.why: no tracked artifact persists semantic action traces for validation-14/18/17/15/11

validation-14.interpretation: trained displacement is not a reliable quality proxy here

validation-18.interpretation: trained displacement is not a reliable quality proxy here

validation-17.interpretation: trained displacement is not a reliable quality proxy here

validation-15.interpretation: trained displacement and quality both worsen together on this case

validation-11.interpretation: trained displacement and quality both worsen together on this case

intent_preservation_metrics.why: tracked reports only persist mean/max displacement and preserved_x_order_fraction, not attach/boundary/pin/group intent counters requested by AGENT_step4.md

final_recommendation.final_diagnosis: Most top-loss cases are consistent with a proposal-quality / objective-mismatch failure: trained checkpoints finish with worse HPWL and bbox-area gaps even when mean repair displacement is lower, and the tracked finalizer is legality-oriented rather than cost-aware.
final_recommendation.recommended_immediate_next_experiment: Instrument and persist stage A-E snapshots for the same top-5 cases, then compare semantic proposal vs post-finalizer HPWL/bbox drift before attempting any new training run.
experiments_to_avoid: Do not use mean repair displacement as the primary model-selection metric.
Do not spend another training cycle on the same AWBC objective before stagewise HPWL/bbox evidence is available.
Do not interpret lower repair motion as proof that the trained proposal is better.

missing_metrics.why_unavailable: tracked reports only persist final evaluated metrics, not per-stage coordinates
HPWL is only persisted after the final evaluator call
no tracked artifact saves intermediate stage geometry snapshots
tracked reports only keep final overlap-pair count after repair
finalizer report is not serialized in the current research artifacts
measure_intent_preservation currently exposes only displacement and x-order preservation
semantic action traces are not persisted in tracked reports

commands_used: python - <<PY ... read current research JSON artifacts and tracked code references ... PY
